change.diff_summary: Increased x0 self-consistency loss weight 0.05->0.15 in diffusion_loss

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Increasing the x0 prediction loss weight strengthens the self-consistency training signal, further improving the denoiser's reconstruction quality.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Higher weight (0.15) on MSE(x0_hat, x0) places more emphasis on accurate x0 reconstruction, aligning gradient signals with the true data manifold.
jury_reasoning.expected_delta: expect Test MAE to decrease further by 2-4 points

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Increase x0 self-consistency loss weight 0.05->0.15
